reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 3 (Code Verification) PASSED: Code reading is accurate. The gossip path validates index < 128 via verify_data_column_sidecar (peerdas_helpers.nim:356), but the sync path (request_manager.nim:190, validator_custody.nim:168) only calls verify_data_column_sidecar_inclusion_proof, which omits index validation. Columns from sync are put directly into ColumnQuarantine, and getIndex (blob_quarantine.nim:237) performs unchecked array access indexMap[int(index)] with indexMap sized to 128. An attacker serving sync requests can send sidecars with index >= 128, causing out-of-bounds access. Matches 01e invariant from outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json line 209: 'sidecar.index must be in range [0, NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS)'. An attacker can trigger this via P2P sync by responding to dataColumnSidecarsByRoot with malicious index values >= 128, causing array bounds violation when accessed, leading to crash or memory corruption affecting sync nodes.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: sidecar.index must be in range [0, NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS) to be accepted.
